About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum Ranker Output SRZN ranks #1 with an exceptional composite score of 94.6, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes (154.55% over 1 year, 130.26% over 6 months) and perfect performance on all four major moving average gates. The stock shows remarkable consistency in ratio progression (4 out of 5 ratio passes) and outperforms SPY and QQQ significantly across multiple periods, with a notably strong bad-day resilience score of 0.23 (lower is more resilient). MEOH places second with a 71.02% annual return and solid 48.98% 3-month performance, both above their respective moving average thresholds; however, it exhibits a weaker bad-spy score of 4.43, indicating less resilience during market downturns compared to SRZN. The data suggests SRZN represents a cleaner, more consistent momentum setup with superior risk characteristics, while MEOH's momentum, though strong, carries higher sensitivity to broader market stress periods.
